mapper.sql: address_id, user_id, contact_name, contact_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, address_tag, is_default, latitude, longitude, sop_requirement_tags_json, sop_hard_filter_tags, sop_remark, sop_updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, address_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, address_tag = #{addressTag}, is_default = #{isDefault}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude} WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 AND deleted = 0
